notes: v0.14.2 — Baked PNG currency icons (high-detail neon hex coin for PULSE, premium gold sparkle star for SURGE) replace the old procedural draws everywhere — top bar, profile wallet, quest rewards, first-clear panel, match card. Both icons cropped + normalized to 256×256 with matching padding so they read at equal weight side-by-side. TUTORIAL — every active lesson now shows a big step-by-step coach panel under the arena: 'STEP X / Y' chip, clear title, one-line instruction, and live progress hint (e.g. 'Still to press: A, D' or 'Targets destroyed: 2 / 3'). Per-lesson scripts for movement, combat, rhythm, boss, plus info-slide pacing. Arena resized so the coach panel always fits cleanly. Windows only.
